text: The department shall deposit in the state highway fund any revenue received under this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 202. Control of Transp. Assets
##### § 202.096 — Revenue

The department shall deposit in the state highway fund any revenue received under this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1171, Sec. 1.20, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The department shall deposit in the state highway fund any revenue received under this subchapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1171, Sec. 1.20, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
